endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/providers/Microsoft.Network/expressRouteGateways
endpoints.description: Lists ExpressRoute gateways under a given subscription.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid.

endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.Network/expressRouteGateways
endpoints.description: Lists ExpressRoute gateways in a given resource group.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.

endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.Network/expressRouteGateways/{expressRouteGatewayName}
endpoints.description: Fetches the details of a ExpressRoute gateway in a resource group.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname. Replace {{EXPRESSROUTEGATEWAYNAME}} with a real expressroutegatewayname.

endpoints.name: PUT /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.Network/expressRouteGateways/{expressRouteGatewayName}
endpoints.description: Creates or updates a ExpressRoute gateway in a specified resource group.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname. Replace {{EXPRESSROUTEGATEWAYNAME}} with a real expressroutegatewayname.

endpoints.name: DELETE /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.Network/expressRouteGateways/{expressRouteGatewayName}
endpoints.description: Deletes the specified ExpressRoute gateway in a resource group. An ExpressRoute gateway resource can only be deleted when there are no connection subresources.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname. Replace {{EXPRESSROUTEGATEWAYNAME}} with a real expressroutegatewayname.

endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.Network/expressRouteGateways/{expressRouteGatewayName}/expressRouteConnections
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname. Replace {{EXPRESSROUTEGATEWAYNAME}} with a real expressroutegatewayname.

endpoints.name: GET /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.Network/expressRouteGateways/{expressRouteGatewayName}/expressRouteConnections/{connectionName}
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{CONNECTIONNAME}} with a real connectionname. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname. Replace {{EXPRESSROUTEGATEWAYNAME}} with a real expressroutegatewayname.

endpoints.name: PUT /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.Network/expressRouteGateways/{expressRouteGatewayName}/expressRouteConnections/{connectionName}
endpoints.description: Creates a connection between an ExpressRoute gateway and an ExpressRoute circuit.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{CONNECTIONNAME}} with a real connectionname. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname. Replace {{EXPRESSROUTEGATEWAYNAME}} with a real expressroutegatewayname.

endpoints.name: DELETE /subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.Network/expressRouteGateways/{expressRouteGatewayName}/expressRouteConnections/{connectionName}
endpoints.description: Deletes a connection to a ExpressRoute circuit.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{CONNECTIONNAME}} with a real connectionname. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname. Replace {{EXPRESSROUTEGATEWAYNAME}} with a real expressroutegatewayname.
